Name: Run Oracle SQLPlus Script
Description: This step will run a script file on an Oracle database using SQLPlus.  This script assumes you have SQLPlus installed and a TNS entry for the database you wish to connect to.

Parameters.Name: Oracle.ScriptFile.Location
Parameters.Label: Script File To Run
Parameters.HelpText: The script file to run on the Oracle server

Parameters.Name: Oracle.Server.Name
Parameters.Label: TNS Name
Parameters.HelpText: The TNS entry in tnsnames.ora containing the necessary connection information.

Parameters.Name: Oracle.User.Name
Parameters.Label: Oracle Username
Parameters.HelpText: The user who has permissions to run the script file on the server

Parameters.Name: Oracle.User.Password
Parameters.Label: Oracle User Password
Parameters.HelpText: The password of the user who will run the script
